# IPluginConfig.SectionChanged event

Fired when any section's underlying file changes — either via [`Save`](../IConfigSection/Save.md) from this process or an external edit detected by the file watcher. The string argument is the section name. Subscribers are called on the game thread.

```csharp
public event Action<string>? SectionChanged;
```
